name: FAI_EMBEDDINGS_MODELS
description: This table stores metadata of the embeddings models supported by Oracle.

columns.Name: MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Autogenerated number and primary key for this table.

columns.Name: MODEL_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the database embeddings model used to convert unstructured data into numeric values for AI.

columns.Name: MODEL_VERSION
columns.Comments: Version number of the embeddings model.

columns.Name: ONNX_FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the ONNX file, an open format for machine learning models, enabling the interchange of models.

columns.Name: MODEL_ENDPOINT_REFERENCE
columns.Comments: For external models, the short name reference to a topology manager record to access the endpoint of the model.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the embedding model indicating whether the embedding model has been loaded to the database or whether embeddings have been generated.

columns.Name: MODEL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the model, DB_RESIDENT or EXTERNAL, indicating where the model is stored.

columns.Name: MODEL_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category that indicates the type of data supported by the embeddings model.

columns.Name: MODEL_LOADING_DATE
columns.Comments: Date the embedding model was loaded into the database.

columns.Name: MODEL_LIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date the embedding model status changed to LIVE.

columns.Name: MODEL_DEPRECATED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date the embedding model status was changed to DEPRECATED.

columns.Name: MODEL_INTRODUCTION_RELEASE
columns.Comments: Fusion Application release when the model was introduced.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
